<!--
Thanks for the contribution! Circuit Breaker is a small hobby project, but
the deploy is real (cb.correax.com) and there is a pre-release gate.
Please walk the checklist below before requesting review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change and why? -->

## Kind of change

- [ ] Bug fix (behavior corrected, no new features)
- [ ] Feature (new gameplay, effect, or capability)
- [ ] Refactor (no observable change)
- [ ] Docs / repo scaffolding
- [ ] Chore (deps, build, tooling)

## Pre-flight checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (typecheck + tests + build + site validation)
- [ ] Any new gameplay behavior is covered by a test in `scripts/*.test.mjs`
- [ ] User-facing text and README stay in sync with the change
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added (or a note below explains why one was necessary)

## Verification

<!--
Screenshots for visual changes, terminal excerpts for gate output, or
"n/a" for pure refactors. Prefer paths under docs/assets/ for images.
-->

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything worth calling out: risky diffs, deferred follow-ups, links to related issues. -->
